task: Add Perplexity to Day 1 AI tool selection

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, real entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard for code, UI, deploy, and customer-facing changes.
Production changes require source-of-truth deploy flow, actual user-facing or runtime verification, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Added Perplexity to backend LLM normalization and display label mapping.
Added Perplexity to Day 1 install guide tool_options, selected-tool copy, install steps, fallback action, and web path perplexity.ai.
Added Perplexity to TrainingScreen immediate-selection UI mapping and install guide override copy.
Added Perplexity to the personalized curriculum LLM selector and intake conversion.
Expanded Day 1 regression tests to require Perplexity in tool options and verify the Perplexity guide URL.
